Capital Events Austin is a locally owned, fully insured party rental and event rental company serving Central Texas with a comprehensive inventory of bounce houses, inflatable castles, water slides, carnival rides, tents, tables, mechanical bulls, combo bounce houses, obstacle courses and event extras. Frequently Asked Questions About Event Rentals in Central Texas

What areas does Capital Events Austin cover? Our rental services reach across the entire region, from party equipment hire Austin to rural venues well out in the country. We serve Austin, Round Rock, Georgetown, Cedar Park, Pflugerville, San Marcos, Temple, Killeen, Waco, Bastrop, and the communities in between.

How far in advance should I book? For popular items like bounce houses and tents, we recommend booking 2 to 4 weeks ahead for weekend events. That said, our team often handles last-minute requests when inventory allows. Don't wait if you're planning a peak-season weekend though - those dates fill up fast.

What's included in your rental packages? Capital Events Austin includes setup and breakdown services with every rental. Our inventory covers:

  • Bounce houses and water slides with safety equipment

  • Tent and table rentals Round Rock area and beyond

  • Audio visual equipment with technical support

  • Tables, chairs, and linens with professional setup

Do you deliver and set up? Yes. Our locally owned and operated crew handles delivery, professional setup, and post-event pickup. We coordinate around your schedule so nothing cuts into your event time.

Are you insured and licensed? We're a fully insured event rental company that meets all Central Texas safety and business requirements. That coverage protects your event and our equipment, so you won't be dealing with unpleasant surprises on the day.

"Our goal is making your celebration memorable while keeping the planning process simple and worry-free for hosts throughout the Hill Country region."

What payment methods do you accept? We accept major credit cards, cash, and checks. A deposit locks in your rental date, with final payment due before delivery. All fees are spelled out upfront - no surprise charges when the truck pulls up.

Can you handle both small and large events? From small backyard parties to large corporate event rentals Killeen and wedding rentals Temple Texas celebrations, our inventory scales to fit events of any size throughout Central Texas.
